Metadata.Comment: Scheduled post-release re-scan of the latest released commit (ff-style nightly job). The release-time scan was clean against the gates in effect at merge; this re-scan re-evaluates the same artifact and surfaces an advisory that is now gated by the CVE release gate.

Vulnerabilities.Title: rustls-webpki: Denial of service via panic on malformed CRL BIT STRING
Vulnerabilities.Description: rustls-webpki before 0.103.13 can be made to panic (denial of service) when parsing a malformed Certificate Revocation List (CRL) containing an invalid BIT STRING. A remote peer able to supply a crafted CRL can crash the verifying process.
